news.summary: 7-Eleven, Inc. is simplifying the indulgence in treats for Easter in Irving, Texas, starting April 15, 2025. They are offering a buy one, get one for $1 deal on candies ranging from jellybeans to chocolates, as well as providing a $20 discount on 7NOW Delivery orders. This promotion enables customers to stock up on their favorite snacks and sweets for the holiday season without breaking the bank.
news.headline: 7-Eleven offers Easter deals: BOGO candy for $1, $20 off 7NOW Delivery orders. Celebrate with sweet treats!

news.summary: Ventura, California - In a recent announcement on April 15, 2025, RevitaLash® Cosmetics, a well-known brand for its cutting-edge beauty products for lashes, brows, and hair, declared a heightened dedication to battling breast cancer through its latest initiative, the Road to $10 Million objective. Their goal for 2024 was to reach...
news.headline: RevitaLash® Cosmetics aims to raise $10 million for breast cancer initiatives by 2025, deepening its commitment in this fight.

news.summary: A notable energy company located in Fort Worth, Texas, U.S. Energy Development Corporation (USEDC), has recently expanded its syndicated revolving credit facility substantially. The facility, which was spearheaded by Citibank, N.A., has been increased from $165 million to $300 million. USEDC holds approximately 20,000 net acres and possesses a significant drilling inventory across multiple benches. This development was disclosed on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: USEDC purchases $390M asset, expands Permian footprint 20,000 net acres; credit facility from $165M to $300M.

news.summary: ActiveCampaign has broadened its cross-channel marketing automation abilities with the acquisition of Mexico City's Hilos. This move, announced on April 15, 2025, bolsters ActiveCampaign's capacity to utilize native WhatsApp messaging. The acquisition showcases ActiveCampaign's commitment to enhancing its services and expanding its reach, further solidifying its position as a top marketing automation platform in the industry. With this acquisition, ActiveCampaign aims to tap into new markets and strengthen its presence in the evolving landscape of digital marketing.
news.headline: ActiveCampaign acquires Hilos to enhance cross-channel marketing with WhatsApp messaging; milestone acquisition expands capabilities.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, Mainstreet Equity Corp. (TSX: MEQ) shared that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.04 per Common Share for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. Shareholders of record as of April 17, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 30, 2025. Mainstreet has classified the complete dividend amount as an "eligible dividend" for tax considerations.
news.headline: Mainstreet Equity Corp. (TSX: MEQ) declares $0.04/ share dividend for Mar 31, 2025 quarter, payable on Apr 30, 2025.

news.summary: The president has made adjustments to his trade demands, causing uncertainties in the markets and prompting his administration to modify its communication.
news.headline: Trump adjusts trade demands, causing confusion in markets. Admin forced to adapt messaging due to changes.

news.summary: Charles Schwab analysts believe that last week's market instability was due to a policy response geared towards the bond market, not the stock market. The bond market saw significant yield fluctuations due to heightened uncertainty, with the U.S. weighted average tariff rate hitting a century-high. Schwab recommends a factor-based investment approach, focusing on characteristics like low volatility, low beta, high interest coverage, and stable profit margins. This is expected to provide resilience during periods of uncertainty. Bond market volatility, as measured by the MOVE index, surpassed stock market volatility, indicating unease among fixed-income investors. This led to a 90-day pause in tariff implementation. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Charles Schwab advises low-volatility, high-quality investments amid century-high U.S. tariff rates. Bond market volatility surges, Schwab recommends factor-based approach for investors. Tariff turmoil prompts Schwab to predict potential policy response. Bond market fluctuations due to unprecedented uncertainty. Resilience in investments suggested for periods of heightened uncertainty. Bond market volatility surpasses stock market's CBOE Volatility Index. Schwab predicts 90-day pause in tariff implementation.

news.summary: Victoria, Seychelles - A major cryptocurrency exchange, MEXC, experienced a significant surge in trading volume after introducing its Zero-Fee Trading Campaign in Q1 2025. This initiative, designed to eliminate fees on select transactions, resulted in a noteworthy uptick in user engagement.
news.headline: MEXC cryptocurrency exchange reports 170% surge in trading volume after Zero-Fee Trading Campaign launch.

news.summary: According to recent data, there has been a notable increase in household water usage in the past year. The average water consumption per household has risen by approximately 15% compared to the previous year, reaching an average of 90 gallons per day. This surge in water usage has been attributed to various factors, including prolonged periods of hot and dry weather in many regions. As a result, water conservation efforts are being emphasized to mitigate the strain on resources and infrastructure. Additionally, there has been a reported 20% increase in water bills for the average household, reflecting the increased consumption. Authorities are urging the public to be mindful of their water usage and adopt more sustainable practices to ensure long-term water availability for all.
news.headline: China Fourth Quarter & Full Year 2024 Financial Results revealed by Tims with significant numbers.

news.summary: Popmenu, a prominent restaurant technology provider and Oracle partner, revealed today that its digital marketing services are now accessible on the Oracle Cloud Marketplace. This development, announced on April 15, 2025, offers restaurants simple online ordering capabilities, boosting their sales opportunities. This partnership aims to enhance convenience and expand reach for dining establishments by leveraging Popmenu's expertise in the industry and Oracle's cloud services. Businesses can expect increased visibility and revenue through this collaboration.
news.headline: Popmenu's marketing suite now on Oracle Cloud Marketplace, boosts sales for restaurants. ATLANTA, April 15, 2025.

news.summary: SynergenX Health, a prominent provider of personalized hormone therapy and wellness services, is endorsing World Hormone Day on April 24th to raise awareness about the vital role hormones play in overall health. This annual global event aims to foster discussions about hormone-related issues and promote solutions without judgment or prejudice. Wayne Wilson, the CEO and Founder of SynergenX, is advocating for heightened attention and intervention in hormone health. He emphasizes the significance of addressing hormone imbalances, stressing the need for education and proactive measures in maintaining well-being.
news.headline: SynergenX Health supports World Hormone Day on April 24th, emphasizing importance of hormones in health. CEO Wayne Wilson advocates for awareness around hormone imbalances and solutions.

news.summary: Kraig Laboratories, trading under the ticker symbol KBLB on the OTCQB market, has effectively introduced its advanced molecular biology and gene-splicing platform.
news.headline: Kraig Labs (OTCQB:KBLB) launches new gene-splicing program & transgenics, advancing molecular biology platform.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Sunny Health & Fitness has unveiled its latest innovation - Wi-Fi-enabled treadmills, aimed at providing top-notch fitness options for home use at an affordable price. This launch underscores the company's dedication to offering accessible and interactive fitness solutions to individuals at any stage of their health quest. The new treadmills, which sync effortlessly with the SunnyFit app, grant users entry to a plethora of workouts.
news.headline: Sunny Health & Fitness introduces Wi-Fi-enabled treadmills, enhancing at-home fitness; integrates with SunnyFit app.

news.summary: In Chicago, Monroe Capital LLC recently led a senior credit facility for Archtop Fiber by Post Road Group, aiding in its growth. Archtop, based in Kingston, New York, offers multi-gig, 100%-fiber internet and phone services across the Northeast to residential and business clients. The company has expanded its service to various locations including Kingston, Saugerties, Rhinebeck, Hudson, Warwick, and Woodstock since the beginning of 2024. Monroe Capital LLC served as the sole lead arranger and administrative agent for the senior credit facility.
news.headline: Monroe Capital supports growth of Archtop Fiber by Post Road Group with senior credit facility to provide multi-gig fiber internet.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, 40 suppliers of nut butter products are preparing to join ReposiTrak before regulatory deadlines. ReposiTrak offers hardware-free traceability solutions, allowing suppliers to easily comply with regulations.
news.headline: ReposiTrak enlists 40 new nut butter suppliers for traceability network, ahead of deadlines, with hardware-free solutions.

news.summary: Pearce, a prominent asset management solutions provider for critical electromechanical infrastructure, has recently finalized the acquisition of JoeMax Telecom LLC. This move signifies Pearce's strategic expansion in the northeast region, accompanied by the incorporation of new technical proficiencies. JoeMax is renowned for its offerings in engineering, site acquisition, and project management services within the telecommunications sector. The specific financial details of the acquisition have not been revealed to the public.
news.headline: Pearce acquires JoeMax Telecom, expanding presence in northeast region, adds new capabilities. Terms undisclosed.

news.summary: Press Ganey, a top provider of experience measurement and data analytics for health systems and health plans, has revealed the acquisition of Hyperlift Logic, a leader in Stars performance analytics. This milestone introduces Press Ganey's Stars Center of Excellence, a fresh initiative merging Hyperlift's advanced analytics with Press Ganey's member experience data, expertise, and AI tools. With this collaboration, Press Ganey aims to enhance its offering and cater to a wider audience, leveraging a vast pool of over 30 million Americans.
news.headline: Press Ganey acquires Hyperlift Logic to boost Medicare Advantage solutions, forming Stars Center of Excellence with advanced analytics.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ABBYY Document AI API offers developers the capability to efficiently convert unstructured documents into precise data, enabling the use of top OCR and IDP solutions.
news.headline: ABBYY introduces new OCR API in Austin, TX to enhance accuracy in automation workflows, transforming unstructured documents into data.

news.summary: A gene editing company, Precision BioSciences, based in Durham, N.C., revealed that the U.S. FDA has granted Fast Track designation for their lead in vivo gene editing program, PBGENE-HBV. This program aims to cure chronic hepatitis B by targeting cccDNA, a crucial source of replication. Precision BioSciences, listed on Nasdaq as DTIL, focuses on developing in vivo gene editing therapies for diseases with high unmet needs. This designation accelerates the regulatory process for PBGENE-HBV, providing crucial support for this innovative treatment approach.
news.headline: Precision BioSciences got FDA Fast Track Designation for PBGENE-HBV, targeting to cure chronic hepatitis B.

news.summary: Pulsate, a company specializing in mobile engagement solutions for digital banking, recently unveiled upgrades to its Opportunities Engine™. By integrating with CRM, core, and SFTP providers, Pulsate has augmented its capacity to gather and analyze data from various financial institution tools. This enhancement enables financial institutions to devise more precise and efficient marketing strategies.
news.headline: Pulsate improves data processing with integrations for targeted campaigns in digital banking - boosting success.Characters: 107

news.summary: Today, Freightos Limited (NASDAQ: CRGO) from Barcelona, Spain, demonstrates remarkable digital transformation resilience amidst tariff uncertainties. This company serves as a top vendor-neutral booking and payment platform for the global freight sector. The significance of this achievement is highlighted by the current date April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Freightos (NASDAQ: CRGO) reports record transactions in Q1 2025, showcasing digital resilience amid tariff uncertainties.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, a woman-owned California cannabis beverage company called Lehua House of Brands has announced an expansion of its award-winning product range. The company has also initiated its canning operations. It is important to note that this expansion and launch were achieved without incurring any debt.
news.headline: Lehua House of Brands expands portfolio in the California cannabis industry as larger operators shut down, showcasing zero debt.

news.summary: XNRGY Climate Systems, a prominent provider of innovative and sustainable HVAC solutions, revealed the launch of its latest manufacturing plant at the Gateway East development in Mesa, Arizona on April 15, 2025. Covering an expansive area of 275,000 square feet, this new facility marks a significant milestone for the company's growth and operations in the region.
news.headline: XNRGY Climate Systems opens a 275,000 sq ft manufacturing facility in Arizona to enhance data center cooling.

news.summary: A manuscript has been released focusing on the impact of caveolin scaffolding domain peptide LTI-2355 on myeloid cell function in cases of Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis (IPF) and Post-Acute Sequelae of COVID Fibrosis (PASC-F). This significant discovery is set in Austin, Texas and was published on April 15, 2025. The study was carried out by Rein Therapeutics (NASDAQ: RNTX), a...
news.headline: Rein Therapeutics reveals study on caveolin-1 peptide's impact on immune cells in IPF and PASC-F. Published in Biomedicines.

news.summary: In Kingston, NY on April 15, 2025, Archtop Fiber, a company offering multi-gig, 100% fiber Internet and phone services to customers in the Northeast region, recently finalized a new credit facility. This financing was secured and spearheaded by the company and will aid in their operations and expansion.
news.headline: Archtop Fiber secures $200M for market expansion in Northeast with new credit facility.

news.summary: Revelstoke Capital Partners, a healthcare-focused private equity firm, has recently finalized a recapitalization of AOM Infusion on April 15, 2025. This move aims to increase patient access to specialty infusion therapies. AOM, a key player in the medical field, will benefit from this deal, enhancing its ability to provide quality healthcare services. This is a significant step towards improving healthcare accessibility for individuals in need of specialized infusion treatments.
news.headline: Revelstoke Capital Partners invest in AOM Infusion to expand patient access to specialty therapies.

news.summary: In Fulton, Maryland on April 15, 2025, N2K Networks has unveiled the comeback of its primary cybersecurity leadership podcast, CISO Perspectives, on the N2K CyberWire network. Esteemed veteran CISO and educator, Kim Jones, takes the reins as the new host. The latest season of the podcast...
news.headline: N2K CyberWire introduces new season of CISO Perspectives podcast with Kim Jones as host.

news.summary: In Hong Kong, on April 15, 2025, Highway Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: HIHO) announced that the increased U.S. tariffs on Chinese imports are not anticipated to significantly affect the company. With less than 4% exposure to products exported from China to the U.S., Highway Holdings remains confident in its ability to weather the impact of the new tariffs.
news.headline: Highway Holdings expects no material impact from US tariffs on Chinese imports, with less than 4% exposure.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) revealed plans to hold a conference call and webcast on May 7, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. CDT to discuss their third quarter fiscal 2025 financial results. This event will provide stakeholders with the opportunity to inquire about the performance and strategies of the company.
news.headline: Bio-Techne (NASDAQ: TECH) to announce Q3 fiscal 2025 results on May 7, 2025, via conference call at 8:00 a.m. CDT.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, enCore Energy Corp. (NASDAQ: EU) (TSXV: EU) based in Dallas introduced Mr. Nathan Tewalt as a new Director to their Board. This American Clean Energy Company™ focuses on clean energy initiatives, positioning itself prominently in the market. The appointment of Mr. Tewalt aligns with their strategic growth plans. For more information, visit their official website at www.encoreuranium.com.
news.headline: enCore Energy adds Nathan Tewalt to Board of Directors. Energy company operating on NASDAQ & TSXV. April 15, 2025.

news.summary: ABC Technologies (ABC) based in Auburn Hills, Michigan, revealed on April 15, 2025, that they have successfully acquired TI Fluid Systems plc (TIFS) for an enterprise value exceeding £1.8 billion. The newly merged entity will operate under the name TI Automotive, marking a significant development in the automotive industry.
news.headline: ABC Technologies completes acquisition of TI Fluid Systems for over £1.8 billion, rebranding as TI Automotive.

news.summary: A well-experienced executive has joined Interplay Learning, an immersive education company based in Austin, Texas, on April 15, 2025. John Pumpelly, with substantial software industry expertise and strong financial leadership skills, has been appointed as the new chief at the company. Interplay Learning, known for providing immersive education for skilled trades, made this strategic decision to further enhance its operations.
news.headline: Interplay Learning appoints John Pumpelly as CFO, bringing expertise in software industry to Austin based company.

news.summary: A new office on Butler Street has enabled the oldest home service company in the area to enhance its operational efficiency in Brooklyn and Manhattan. Established on April 15, 2025, Petri Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Drain Cleaning, a family-owned enterprise, extends its services to the community, with a focus on Brooklyn and Manhattan.
news.headline: Petri Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Drain Cleaning opens second location in Park Slope, enhancing service efficiency in Brooklyn and Manhattan.

news.summary: Energy company Fervo Energy, based in Houston, has finalized a significant deal with Shell Energy. The agreement entails a 31-megawatt power purchase that spans over a 15-year period. This partnership marks a strategic move within the energy sector, solidifying Fervo Energy's position in the market.
news.headline: Fervo Energy secures 31 MW power deal with Shell Energy for 15 years in Houston.

news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, Polestar (NASDAQ: PSNY) has released its fourth Annual Sustainability report, revealing noteworthy progress in sustainability efforts. The report highlights substantial reductions in greenhouse gas emissions, advancements in the Polestar 0 initiative, and an ongoing commitment to enhancing transparency and integrating sustainable materials. Since 2020, Polestar has successfully decreased its carbon footprint per vehicle sold by an impressive 24.7%. Key contributors to this accomplishment include a higher utilization of low-carbon aluminum. The company's dedication to sustainability is evident through these achievements and ongoing initiatives.
news.headline: Polestar report: 25% cut in emissions per car sold since 2020. Increased use of low-carbon materials key factor.

news.summary: A US-based deep-sea mining company, Impossible Metals, has requested to initiate a leasing process for exploring and potentially mining critical minerals in the deep sea near American Samoa. This company is leading in its industry and is the first to seek a lease for critical minerals under the Outer Continental Shelf Lands Act of 1953. The process is regulated by the U.S. Bureau of Ocean Energy Management (BOEM), a division of the U.S. Department of t.
news.headline: Impossible Metals seeks deep sea mining lease in U.S. waters off American Samoa. 1st to request lease under Outer Continental Shelf Lands Act of 1953 from BOEM.

news.summary: In Houston, Collide, a GenAI Platform for the energy industry, revealed the completion of a $5 million seed funding round. Mercury Fund led the funding, with contributions from Bryan Sheffield, Billy Quinn, and David Albin, among other oil and gas experts. This investment aims to boost the advancement of Collide's GenAI-driven platform, enhance engineering capabilities, and expand technical teams. The move comes amidst a notable generational shift in the sector.
news.headline: Collide secures $5M funding led by Mercury Fund to scale GenAI platform for energy sector, expand teams.

news.summary: Bidgely, based in Los Altos, California, has been acknowledged by Guidehouse Research as a "Leader" for its whole-home energy management system solutions powered by artificial intelligence. The evaluation, Guidehouse Research Leaderboard: Home Energy Management Systems Providers, reviewed 10 HEMS vendors and identified Bidgely as a standout for its advanced technologies and established customer base. This recognition underscores Bidgely's expertise in providing comprehensive HEMS solutions for utilities and consumers.
news.headline: Bidgely remains top Home Energy Management provider according to Guidehouse Research, evaluated 10 vendors.

news.summary: Today, in Hangzhou, China, on April 15, 2025, Youdao, Inc. (NYSE: DAO), a leading AI solutions provider focusing on artificial intelligence in learning and advertising sectors, disclosed the submission of its yearly report.
news.headline: Youdao filed its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F as an AI solutions provider specializing in learning and advertising.

news.summary: Experienced industry professional Bernadette Flores has been appointed as the Senior Vice President to spearhead the expansion efforts at Transatlantic Underwriters (TAU), a renowned provider of specialty insurance services for the transportation sector. The company, based in Marietta, Georgia, shared this exciting news on April 15, 2025, via PRNewswire. The announcement detailed the introduction of a fresh Property & Casualty (P&C) division as a part of their business growth strategy.
news.headline: Transatlantic Underwriters launches new P&C insurance division with Bernadette Flores as Senior VP.

news.summary: An announcement was made that a significant amount of capital has been secured to aid in the further advancement of the innovative GPR35 Inhibitor Program for the treatment of ulcerative colitis. This program, developed by ThirtyFiveBio Limited in Oxford, United Kingdom, will focus on utilizing a biomarker-driven, precision medicine approach. The funding will support the ongoing research and development efforts to bring this first-in-class treatment to patients. Stay tuned for updates as this promising project progresses in the medical field.
news.headline: ThirtyFiveBio secures strategic investment from AbbVie Ventures for its GPR35 Inhibitor Program to treat Ulcerative Colitis.

news.summary: The Scag® RC Extreme Slope™ Mower is set to showcase the innovative ABS' Alliance Intelligent Battery Series™, providing uninterrupted power throughout the day without the need for maintenance. This partnership between American Battery Solutions (ABS) and SCAG Power Equipment introduces cutting-edge technology for enhanced performance. The collaboration, announced on April 15, 2025, in Lake Orion, Michigan, signifies a significant advance in the industry. The mower equipped with this technology promises improved efficiency and reliability, catering to the needs of consumers. This development marks a new chapter in power equipment, with numbers indicating increased convenience and effectiveness in lawn care machinery.
news.headline: American Battery Solutions partners with SCAG Power Equipment to power commercial mowers with lithium-ion tech. - ABS provides all-day power with zero maintenance.

news.summary: Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW), based in Jacksonville, Florida, a prominent player in space infrastructure, has secured a contract from Thales Alenia Space for the provision of four docking mechanisms for the European Space Agency’s lunar Gateway habitation module, Lunar I-Hab. Thales Alenia Space, a joint venture between Thales and Leonardo, awarded the contract. The subsidiary of Redwire, Redwire Space NV located in Belgium, will be handling the project. This development marks a significant step in Redwire's contributions to the space economy.
news.headline: Redwire to provide docking system for Lunar Gateway. Awarded contract by Thales Alenia Space for 4 docking mechanisms. $RDW

news.summary: Primis, a prominent discovery platform, has revealed its partnership expansion with HUMAN Security on April 15, 2025, in TEL AVIV, Israel. This collaboration aims to provide platforms with enhanced defenses against ad fraud, offering pre-bid detection and mitigation controls. By integrating HUMAN's Ad Fraud Defense, Primis seeks to safeguard marketplace integrity and combat fraudulent activities. This partnership marks a significant step towards protecting digital advertising efforts, underscoring the importance of maintaining trust and transparency in the industry.
news.headline: Primis and HUMAN expand partnership to strengthen trust in digital advertising; Primis is a leading discovery platform.

news.summary: Boston-based company, 908 Devices Inc. (Nasdaq: MASS), specializing in handheld chemical analysis tools for safety and defense tech, revealed early unaudited financial data for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The first quarter of 2025 anticipates at least $11.5 million in revenue from continuing operations, marking a notable increase from the previous year's $7.4 million in revenue from continuing operations during the same period.
news.headline: 908 Devices expects Q1 2025 revenue of $11.5 million, up from $7.4 million in Q1 2024. Specializes in chemical analysis tools.

news.summary: Recent research has revealed the direction in which advertising is heading, with Rembrand leading the way in this new technology. The study was carried out by Kantar, a global leader in marketing data and analytics. The findings were released in Palo Alto on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Kantar study shows Rembrand's in-scene media boosts brand awareness & differentiation. Embracing future tech in advertising.

news.summary: In the third quarter of 2025, Aduro successfully progressed with its pilot plant operations, aligning with the company's strategic goals. Furthermore, the organization secured a new patent during this period, emphasizing its commitment to innovation and intellectual property protection. In addition, Aduro saw significant growth in its leadership team, adding key individuals to drive the company forward. The company also reported a robust cash position, indicating strong financial health. Notably, Aduro achieved a significant milestone by being listed on the Nasdaq, celebrated through a ceremonial event marked by the Closing Bell ceremony.
news.headline: Aduro Q3 2025: Pilot plant progressing, new patent filed, leadership growth, solid cash position, Nasdaq milestone with ceremony.

news.summary: On Wednesday, April 23, 2025, at 2:30 p.m. Eastern Time, a virtual Key Opinion Leader (KOL) event will be held in CAMBRIDGE, Mass. Scheduled by Leap Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: LPTX), a leading biotechnology firm specializing in targeted and immuno-oncology treatments. This event signifies a significant announcement by the company in the field.
news.headline: Leap Therapeutics to host virtual event on Sirexatamab for Colorectal Cancer on Apr 23, 2025, at 2:30pm ET. Nasdaq: LPTX.

news.summary: Recently, there has been an increase in COVID-19 cases in the city, with a total of 500 new cases reported in the past week. This surge has led to a total of 2,000 active cases currently being monitored. Additionally, the hospitalization rate has doubled in the last two weeks, with 100 patients currently in the intensive care unit. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: Talisker increases brokered private placement to raise up to $6.5M in proceeds.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on April 15, 2025, Aben Minerals Ltd. (TSX-V: ABM) (OTCQB: ABNAF) (Frankfurt: R26) disclosed plans for a significant development. The company, known for their mining endeavors, will be changing their name from Aben Minerals Ltd. to Aben Gold Corp. This change signifies a strategic shift in focus towards gold-related operations.
news.headline: Aben Minerals Ltd. will become Aben Gold Corp. (TSX-V: ABM, OTCQB: ABNAF, Frankfurt: R26) as per the announcement.
